name: Ichiya Vandalay Kotobuki
description: Ichiya is one of the top mages of the Blue Pegasus Guild, as well as the leader of The Trimens (composed of Hibiki Laytis, Ren Akatsuki and Eve Thylm). Like the rest of his group he is a womanizer but, unlike them, is nowhere near as handsome, though he thinks of himself as such.
